name: GVK Power & Infrastructure Limited
summary: GVK Power & Infrastructure Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides operation and maintenance, manpower and consultancy, and incidental services to the owners of power plants, airports, and infrastructure companies in India and internationally. It operates through Roads, Power, Airport, and Others segments. The company constructs and operates power plants, highway projects, and airports; explores coal mines; and invests in SEZ and other assets, as well as generates power, and offers hospitality and life science services. GVK Power & Infrastructure Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Secunderabad, India.
